aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 近期观点偏向于在回调中加仓，认为市场恐慌是流动性问题而非基本面改变，坚信光子学和机器人主题将长期跑赢。
representative_quotes: Pluggables will be around for the next 10 years. Feels like there's room for every qualified laser supplier given the industry demand is growing faster than what they can all collectively make.
I personally have a longer horizon + higher tolerance for volatility than others, to see how this plays out.
I think current market conditions are a reflection of liquidity and leverage, not individual fundamentals.

unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期偏向关注AI基础设施巨额投资与地缘冲突对市场的影响，同时对高估值和杠杆风险发出警告
representative_quotes: Alphabet Inc. plans to spend up to $185 billion in 2026, more than doubling its previous year's investment, to expand data centers critical for AI development.
There is a 36% chance the Fed does 2 rate hikes in 2026, per Polymarket.
Iran Navy has said that the Strait of Hormuz remains closed

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期从对存储整体乐观转为侧重云厂和端侧AI，同时因杠杆亏损和回调更加重视仓位管理与基本面匹配
representative_quotes: 云厂是不管谁领先，它的生意都越来越大需求越来越旺，它都能吃到调配算力的溢价。
存储的量决定了他们能训练多少数据，因为音频数据的大小规模千倍万倍于文本图片。
对于顶尖的模型来的算力和内存一直紧缺，差生只是文具多才出租算力。
